assertionResults.title: Pagination controls on Storm Watch table
assertionResults.reason: Storm Watch table footer shows page-size selector and previous/next controls.
reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:5173/storm-watch.
Verify footer has Rows per page selector (25/50/100) plus Previous/Next buttons.
Capture screenshot of footer controls.

evidence.dom: Rows per page select present with options 25/50/100; Previous button disabled on page 1; Next button enabled.

assertionResults.title: Storm Watch pagination works
assertionResults.reason: Default size shows 25 rows on page 1 and navigating Next moves to page 2 with different pagination state; changing page size to 50 shows all 40 rows on one page.
reproductionNotes: On /storm-watch at size 25, record page metrics.
Click Next page and verify page indicator changes to page 2 and row count changes.
Change Rows per page to 50 and verify single-page result set with all rows visible.

evidence.dom: Page1: rowCount=25, pageIndicator='Page 1 of 2'. Page2: rowCount=15, pageIndicator='Page 2 of 2'. Size50: rowCount=40, pageIndicator='Page 1 of 1'.

assertionResults.title: Pagination controls on Cases table
assertionResults.reason: After seeding fixture cases in-session via /fixtures/convert-case, Cases table rendered footer controls with page-size selector and previous/next buttons.
reproductionNotes: Use /fixtures/convert-case and create fixture cases in the same browser session.
Navigate to /cases.
Verify footer includes Rows per page selector (25/50/100) and Previous/Next controls.

evidence.dom: Cases nav count showed seeded data (Cases 35); footer controls present with 25/50/100 and Previous/Next.

assertionResults.title: Cases pagination works
assertionResults.reason: With 35 seeded fixture cases, page size 25 produced 2 pages (25 + 10 rows), and page size 50 collapsed to one page with all 35 rows.
reproductionNotes: On /cases with seeded fixture data, verify page 1 metrics at size 25.
Click Next and verify page indicator and row count change on page 2.
Set Rows per page to 50 and verify one-page table with all rows visible.

evidence.dom: Size25 Page1: rowCount=25, pageIndicator='Page 1 of 2'. Size25 Page2: rowCount=10, pageIndicator='Page 2 of 2'. Size50: rowCount=35, pageIndicator='Page 1 of 1'.

assertionResults.title: Loading spinner during Leads data fetch
assertionResults.reason: Spinner was observed during initial leads route load before data table rendered.
reproductionNotes: Reload http://localhost:5173/.
Immediately check for [data-testid='loading-spinner'].
Capture screenshot while spinner is visible.

evidence.dom: Observed state on reload: {spinner:true, noLeads:false, noLeadsMatch:false, path:'/'}

assertionResults.title: Loading spinner during Storm Watch data fetch
assertionResults.reason: Spinner was observed on storm-watch route during initial candidate fetch before table content rendered.
reproductionNotes: Reload http://localhost:5173/storm-watch.
Immediately check for [data-testid='loading-spinner'].
Capture screenshot while spinner is visible.

evidence.dom: Observed state on reload: {spinner:true, noStorm:false, path:'/storm-watch'}

assertionResults.title: Loading spinner during Cases data load
assertionResults.reason: Spinner was observed during cases route load prior to case list rendering.
reproductionNotes: Reload http://localhost:5173/cases.
Immediately check for [data-testid='loading-spinner'].
Capture screenshot while spinner is visible.

evidence.dom: Observed state on reload: {spinner:true, noCases:false, path:'/cases'}

frictions.description: Cases view can be empty with no pagination footer if no case rows are present.
frictions.resolution: Used the documented fixture flow (/fixtures/convert-case) within the same browser session to create fixture cases before validating VAL-DASH-024/025.

frictions.description: Fixture modal/drawer overlay occasionally blocked sidebar tab click while returning to Cases.
frictions.resolution: Dismissed overlays with Escape before navigation to keep interactions deterministic.

summary: Validated 7 assigned dashboard assertions (VAL-DASH-022..028): 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Storm Watch and Cases pagination controls/behavior were confirmed with screenshots and DOM checks; all three loading-spinner assertions were observed during route fetch startup.
